---
layout: default
title: CV
---

## Academic positions and education

- **Since 2019**  
  Associate Professor, MAP5, Université Paris Cité  

- **2018-2019**  
  Postdoctoral researcher, Department of Mathematics, KTH, Stockholm   

- **2015-2018**  
  PhD, *Analysis, control and optimisation of PDEs, application to the biology and therapy of cancer*, LJLL, Sorbonne Université, Paris  
  Advisors: Jean Clairambault, Emmanuel Trélat

- **2014-2015**  
  Master's degree in Mathematics of Modelling, Sorbonne Université, Paris

- **2013-2014**  
  Agrégation in mathematics

## PhD supervision

- **Raphaël Stussi**  
  Development and analysis of algorithms for cryo-electron microscopy  
  <em>Co-supervised with Rémy Abergel and Sylvain Durand</em>


- **Ivan Hasenohr**  
  Computer-assisted proofs of reachability analysis for linear control systems under bounded constraints  
  <em>Co-supervised with Yannick Privat and Christophe Zhang</em>


- **Cécile Della Valle**  
  Regularisation methods and neural networks, applications to inverse problems with transport  
  <em>Co-supervised with Sylvain Durand and Pauline Tan</em>

- **Jules Guilberteau**  
  Asymptotic and numerical analysis of models for heterogeneous cell populations  
  <em>Co-supervised with Nastassia Pouradier Duteil</em>
